title: PRESCHOOL - 211info
text: ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA PRESCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Licensed preschool program offering a curriculum that emphasizes in science, techonology, engineering, arts, mathematics, and more. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 3-5 Hours: Half day: Monday-Friday 7:30am-noon Full day: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-9622 Preschool Director Suzie Sanders Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Half day: $1,125 per child per month Full-day: $1,500 per child per month Materials fee: $150 Financial assistance is available through Employment Related Day Care (ERDC) DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, health records LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 9am-4pm Services: Preschools Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFTER SCHOOL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - DEBOER SUMMER CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - GYMNASTICS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING LESSONS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
